meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [1.0.0] - 2024-02-12
### Added
initial model adjusted from product stock model 1.0.0.
removed positions collection and refined allocatedStocks into allocatedDaysOfSupply
QuantityCharacteristic changed from Collection to SortedSet to reflect the date-daysOfSupply sorted pair
definitions for aspect model provided

## [2.0.0] - 2024-03-04
### Added
lastUpdatedOnDateTime property (samm-c:Timestamp) to describe when the data was last updated

nodes.label: DaysOfSupply
nodes.description: Days of Supply refers to the amount of days where item stock is sufficient for the demand. The incoming deliveries are not considered in the main days-of-supply-equation, but they can still be included in the projection of days-of-supply for the future days.

nodes.label: materialGlobalAssetId
nodes.preferredName: UUID of the Part Type Twin
nodes.description: Identifier used uniquely to identify part type twin.

nodes.label: direction
nodes.description: Direction of the stock from data provider perspective.

nodes.label: allocatedDaysOfSupply
nodes.description: Days of supply that have been already allocated to the customer.

nodes.label: amountOfAllocatedDaysOfSupply
nodes.preferredName: Amount of Allocated Days Of Supply
nodes.description: Amount of Days of supply of a given allocated item stock in a given location.

nodes.label: stockLocationBPNS
nodes.description: BPNS identifying the site the stock is located at. One stock has always one location.

nodes.label: stockLocationBPNA
nodes.description: BPNA identifying the address the stock is located at. One stock has always one location.

nodes.label: lastUpdatedOnDateTime
nodes.description: Date and time at which the allocated days of supply has been updated by reporting partner's system. Date and time are set according to a timezone.

nodes.label: date
nodes.description: Date refers to the specific calendar day (current or projected) associated with the measured (or expected) inventory level. It serves as a timestamp for calculating Days of Supply, indicating when the inventory count was taken or projected.

nodes.label: daysOfSupply
nodes.description: Amount of days, before the current stock is expected to be exhausted. Days of supply of a customer: Number of days where; (Stock) - Σ(daily Demand) >= 0; Days of supply of a supplier: Number of days where; (Stock) - Σ(daily Outgoing Shipments) >= 0

nodes.label: DirectionCharacteristic
nodes.description:
If a supplier provides stock information to a customer, use "OUTBOUND".
If a customer provides stock information to a supplier, use "INBOUND".

nodes.label: AllocatedDaysOfSupplySet
nodes.description: Set of allocated Days of Supply that may relate to different stock locations.

nodes.label: AllocatedDaysOfSupply
nodes.preferredName: Days Of Supply Allocated to a Partner
nodes.description:
This defines the number of days with allocated supply for an item stock in a given location that is available for the use in production or deliveries. 
The allocated days of supply are not available for other customers.

nodes.label: QuantityOfDaysOfSupply
nodes.description: Days of supply for a specific date.

nodes.label: QuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: List of quantity of days of supply. It MUST include at least current date and it is recommended to include future dates.
